acousticsystem.options.title: Sound Physics
acousticsystem.options.enabled.tooltip: Switches to vanilla sound processing while preserving these settings.
acousticsystem.options.open.tooltip: Configure the quality of block- and room-aware sound processing.
acousticsystem.options.preset.low.toolti: Greatly reduces processing. Accuracy may be lower in complex spaces.
acousticsystem.options.preset.high.toolt: The default. Preserves the current acoustic quality and accuracy.
acousticsystem.options.preset.ultra.tool: Calculates more paths for finer detail in complex spaces.
acousticsystem.options.details.tooltip: Configure individual processing stages and sample counts.
acousticsystem.options.details.title: Sound Physics Details
acousticsystem.options.reflections.toolt: Calculates early reflections returning from walls and surfaces.
acousticsystem.options.diffraction.toolt: Calculates sound paths bending around walls and corners.
acousticsystem.options.reverb.tooltip: Calculates reverb from the size and materials of the current space.
acousticsystem.options.room_rays.tooltip: Number of samples used to measure the space around the listener.
Number of samples used to measure the space around each sound source.
Number of samples used to trace lingering reflections.
acousticsystem.options.late_reverb_bounc: Maximum number of surface bounces for each reverb path.
acousticsystem.options.diffraction_paths: Maximum number of diffraction paths retained through complex structures.
acousticsystem.options.reset_all.tooltip: Restores High quality and resets every effect, sample, distance, air absorption, room detection, occlusion, and update setting.
acousticsystem.options.realistic_distanc: Uses inverse-distance-like physical attenuation instead of linear attenuation.
acousticsystem.options.atmospheric_absor: Applies frequency-dependent air absorption from distance, temperature, humidity, and pressure.
Physical length of one block for distance and wavelength calculations.
acousticsystem.options.distance_referenc: No additional distance attenuation is applied inside this distance.
Controls how quickly direct sound decreases as distance increases.
acousticsystem.options.air_temperature.t: Temperature used for frequency-dependent atmospheric absorption.
acousticsystem.options.relative_humidity: Relative humidity affecting high-frequency absorption in air.
acousticsystem.options.air_pressure.tool: Atmospheric pressure used by the air absorption model.
acousticsystem.options.air_absorption_sc: Multiplier for calculated air absorption. 1.00 is the physical reference.
acousticsystem.options.reflection_gain.t: Overall multiplier for material- and path-derived early reflections.
Overall multiplier for sound arriving around edges.
acousticsystem.options.reverb_send.toolt: Amount of each source sent into the current room's reverberant field.
acousticsystem.options.room_gain.tooltip: Overall level of the field derived from room size and absorption area.
Multiplier for reverb arriving after multiple surface reflections.
Multiplier for the physically calculated reverb duration.
acousticsystem.options.enclosed_room_sen: How strongly a source in the same enclosed room excites its diffuse field.
acousticsystem.options.max_decay_time.to: Upper limit for the reverb duration used by calculated results.
acousticsystem.options.late_reverb_cutof: Stops tracing a reverb path when its energy falls below this value.
acousticsystem.options.room_probe_distan: Maximum listener-centered distance searched for walls and openings.
acousticsystem.options.room_opening_cont: How much deeper a direction must be than nearby surfaces to count as an opening.
acousticsystem.options.room_opening_area: Area multiplier for reverberant energy escaping through openings.
acousticsystem.options.room_coupled_esca: Fraction of reverberant energy carried into a room connected through an opening.
acousticsystem.options.reverb_distance.t: Reference distance for carrying a room field along opening paths.
acousticsystem.options.occlusion_radius_: Minimum finite wavefront radius sampled for direct-sound occlusion.
Maximum radius over which occlusion samples can spread at long range.
acousticsystem.options.occlusion_angular: Rate at which the direct-sound sampling radius grows with distance.
acousticsystem.options.response_time.too: Dynamic time constant used to move smoothly toward a new physical result.
acousticsystem.options.max_result_age.to: Age at which a calculation is discarded because it may no longer match the current state.
